creator: beckman@purplecow.com
text:
Paypal no longer has a link to the old FreeBSD version of the pfpro libraries.  However, by taking an existing
    download URL such as https://manager.paypal.com/downloadAgreement.do?file=pfpro_bsdi.tar.gz and changing it to
    https://manager.paypal.com/downloadAgreement.do?file=pfpro_freebsd.tar.gz you will get the file you need.  That file
    has changed its signature and size, and thus the distinfo file needs an update.

    Maintainer may want to bump the portversion or not; Paypal reports 3.0.8 still.  However a note in the pkg-descr
    about the manual download of the freebsd version will be helpful to future users.

How-To-Repeat: 	Download the bsdi version and it fails.  Download the freebsd version and it fails hash checks.
